title: AeroSociety
description: Modpack focused around the Create Aeronautics mod and revamping the base vanilla experience
body:
### Everything here can and will change this is very much in the beta stage.

This modpack does not include Create: Aeronautics because as of now it isn't released yet. This is meant to be kind of a test run so we have a complete modpack when it does come out.

Theres a lot of mods but the main ones are [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) (+addons) and the [Let's do series](https://modrinth.com/user/satisfyu) and for the generation its [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith) + [[Let's Do] Meadow](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-meadow) + [[Let's Do] BloomingNature](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-bloomingnature) for the overworld, [Jaden's Nether Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/jadens-nether-expansion) for The Nether and [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nullscape) for The End.

---

Modpack is meant to be played on the [official server](https://discord.gg/7YpkUaZsNz) but it can be played in singleplayer as well.

---

To join the offical server (still very much beta and will probably reset at some point) just dm me on discord and tell me something about yourself: `.kynzo` (don't forget to join the discord server linked here to be able to dm me without being friends)

---

I'd recommend this modpack to experienced vanilla players that tried everything in vanilla minecraft so they dont find it fun anymore. Reason for that is i changed or disabled a lot of vanilla features so i'd force the player to try new stuff either vanilla or modded (mostly create)

Some of the things changed from vanilla (or some mods):
- There's the create mod and some of it's addons. This is a great thing to explore if you loved making farms and redstone contraptions in vanilla but reached the limitations of vanilla minecraft.
- The Let's Do series adds a lot of new cooking and brewing recipes. these mods I'd recommend for the cozy players who like to build there farms and rp while baking, cooking, brewing all the new food items.
- The Elytra has been removed (not really just the ability to fly with it was :D), BUT instead of it there has been many planes and airships added (they are supposed to replace Create: Aeronautics until it comes out)
- There's tons of tiny changes into the game which would take hours to list so I'll just list few: Fireflies!, Bundle scroll, Pushing Lily pads instead of breaking them, revamped fishing mechanics and much more.

---

If i had to describe the modpack in one word i'd say vanila+++ :D

---

In case you have any questions what so ever don't hesitate to dm me on discord: `.kynzo`

---
